message:
feat(load): integrate meta-skill resolution into ms load

- attempt meta-skill lookup before standard skill resolution to allow "ms load <meta-skill>" usage
- load meta-skill registry from project/global .ms/meta-skills paths and skip if none found
- build condition context (cwd + detected tech stacks) and use pack budget or recommended tokens
- emit meta-skill specific output for human + robot modes while preserving fallback
